rationale: Both correctly identify PR #4527 as the regression, PR #4792 as the fix, and confirm it's folded into the 0.24 rebase (a560ed18), matching the thread resolution and offering the same async_chunk:true workaround. Y's code citations closely mirror the exact confirmed diff (file, variable names inter_stage_outputs/multimodal_outputs/per_req_payloads) from akshatvishu's comment, while X fabricates an elaborate alternate regression site in gpu_ar_model_runner.py with different variable names, invented scheduler class/stage names, and log strings that appear nowhere in the ground truth, inflating hallucination risk despite polished presentation.
